title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.023 - Actuary or actuarial firm to give technical advice
text:
103.023.  Actuary or actuarial firm to give technical advice. — The board shall employ or contract with an actuary or firm of actuaries familiar with health care financing as technical advisor to the board on matters regarding the operation and funding of the plan from an actuarial basis and shall perform such duties as are from time to time required by the board.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 1 subsec. 11)
